2604.13737.title: TokenFormer: Unify the Multi-Field and Sequential Recommendation Worlds
2604.13737.paper_summary: Recommender systems have historically developed along two largely independent paradigms: feature interaction models for modeling correlations among multi-field categorical features, and sequential models for capturing user behavior dynamics from historical interaction sequences. Although recent trends attempt to bridge these paradigms within shared backbones, we empirically reveal that naive unifying these two branches may lead to a failure mode of Sequential Collapse Propagation (SCP). That is, the interaction with those dimensionally ill non-sequence fields leads to the dimensional collapse of the sequence features. To overcome this challenge, we propose TokenFormer, a unified recommendation architecture with the following innovations. First, we introduce a Bottom-Full-Top-Sliding (BFTS) attention scheme, which applies full self-attention in the lower layers and shrinking-window sliding attention in the upper layers. Second, we introduce a Non-Linear Interaction Representation (NLIR) that applies one-sided non-linear multiplicative transformations to the hidden states. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and Tencent's advertising platform demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, while detailed analysis confirm that TokenFormer significantly improves dimensional robustness and representation discriminability under unified modeling.
2604.13737.paper_summary_zh: 推薦系統歷史上主要沿著兩個獨立的範式發展：特徵互動模型用於建模多字段類別特徵之間的相關性，以及序列模型用於捕捉來自歷史互動序列的用戶行為動態。雖然最近的趨勢試圖在共享骨幹內橋接這些範式，但我們實證揭示，天真的統一這兩個分支可能導致序列崩潰傳播（SCP）的失效模式。也就是說，與那些維度不良的非序列字段的互動會導致序列特徵的維度崩潰。為了克服這一挑戰，我們提出了TokenFormer，一種具有以下創新統一推薦架構。首先，我們引入了一種底部-全-頂部-滑動（BFTS）注意力機制，該機制在下層應用全自注意力，在上層應用縮窗滑動注意力。其次，我們引入了一種非線性互動表示（NLIR），對隱藏狀態應用單側非線性乘法變換。在公共基準和騰訊廣告平台上的廣泛實驗展示了最先進的性能，而詳細分析確認TokenFormer在統一建模下顯著提高了維度穩健性和表示可區分性。
2604.13737.author: Yifeng Zhou et.al.
2604.13737.authors: Yifeng Zhou, Yuehong Hu, Zhixiang Feng, Junwei Pan, Kaihui Wu, Hanyong Li, Shangyu Zhang, Shudong Huang, Zhangbin Zhu, Chengguo Yin, Haijie Gu, Jie Jiang
